title: ProposalReceipt v0
description: Signed receipt proving a FORGE proposal envelope was produced from a specific input under a specific policy and code version. Fields are grouped into attestation-aligned structures (subject, materials, policy, builder) with a predicateType discriminator.

predicateType.description: Attestation type discriminator — identifies this as a FORGE attestation programmatically

digest.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonicalized proposal envelope

uri.description: Optional URI identifier for the output (null at v0)

digest.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonicalized raw pre-ingest input

canonicalization.description: Canonicalization algorithm used for input hashing

uri.description: Optional URI identifier for the input (null at v0)

policy.description: Policy inputs: rules and regulatory data

policy_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of all policy inputs (rules + regulatory data)

rule_set_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonicalized RULES array

builder.description: Code identity: who/what built this receipt

git_sha.description: Git commit SHA at build time (null if not in git repo)

package_lock_sha.description: Reserved for future dependency fingerprinting (null at v0)

computed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of receipt generation (metadata, not in signed payload)

http_transcript_receipts.description: Reserved for chain-of-custody HTTP transcript receipts (null at v0)

key_id.description: Key identifier from the keyring (null if unsigned)

signature.description: ed25519 signature of the canonical signed payload (null if unsigned, 'ed25519:' prefixed when signed)
